meaning: n.盎格鲁族之方言,盎格鲁族人adj.盎格鲁人的
examples: The East Anglian club were founder members of the Premier League in 1992, opening with a stunning 4-2 win at Arsenal after being two down at half-time.
A few months ago, I saw inspiration of a different kind when Iopened the new Cambridge base of the East Anglian Air Ambulance, where Prince William works as a helicopter pilot.
